name: lion-wallet
description: Lion Wallet — minimal EVM wallet for Safari (Web Extension MV3)

scripts.build:ext: tsgo --noEmit && tsgo -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && pnpm icons && node scripts/build.ts
scripts.build:safari: pnpm build:ext && xcodebuild -project xcode/LionWallet/LionWallet.xcodeproj -scheme LionWallet -configuration Debug build
scripts.run:safari: pnpm build:safari && open "$(xcodebuild -project xcode/LionWallet/LionWallet.xcodeproj -scheme LionWallet -configuration Debug -showBuildSettings 2>/dev/null | grep ' BUILT_PRODUCTS_DIR' | awk '{print $3}')/LionWallet.app"
scripts.push: git remote remove publish 2>/dev/null; git remote add publish git@github-personal:lsheva/lion-wallet.git && git push publish HEAD --follow-tags; git remote remove publish
